name: Tehran Ministry of Defense Strike
description: Combined US/Israeli strike on Iran's Ministry of Defense compound in central Tehran as part of opening salvo of Operation Epic Fury.

name: MOIS Headquarters Strike
description: Precision strike on Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security headquarters in Tehran. Secretary Ali Shamkhani among confirmed killed.

name: AEOI Headquarters Strike
target: Atomic Energy Organization of Iran HQ
description: Strike on AEOI headquarters in Tehran, targeting Iran's civilian nuclear administration.

name: Parchin Military Complex Strike
casualties: IRGC Ground Forces Commander Gen. Mohammad Pakpour killed
description: Massive strike on Parchin military-industrial complex southeast of Tehran. IRGC Ground Forces Commander-in-Chief among confirmed killed.

name: Supreme Leader Compound Strike
casualties: Ali Khamenei killed, Abdul Rahim Mousavi killed
description: Decapitation strike on the Supreme Leader's compound in Tehran. Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and Armed Forces Chief of Staff Abdul Rahim Mousavi confirmed killed.

name: IRGC Headquarters Strike
description: Strike on IRGC central headquarters in Tehran as part of the systematic targeting of Iran's military command structure.

name: Isfahan Military Complex Strike
description: Strikes on military-industrial targets around Isfahan, Iran's second major defense production hub.

name: Bushehr Area Strikes
description: Strikes on military installations in the Bushehr province, separate from the civilian nuclear power plant.

name: Konarak Naval Base Strike
casualties: Base largely destroyed, multiple IRIN vessels sunk at berth
description: Combined air and naval strike on Konarak Naval Base in southeastern Iran, a key IRIN facility on the Gulf of Oman.

name: Chabahar Port Military Strike
description: Strikes on military port infrastructure at Chabahar, Iran's strategic southeastern port near the Pakistan border.

name: Qom Military Targets Strike
description: Strikes on IRGC command and control facilities in the Qom area.

name: Tabriz Air Defense Strike
description: SEAD/DEAD strikes on integrated air defense systems around Tabriz in northwestern Iran.

name: Minab School Strike (Civilian)
description: Strike on what was reported as a military target in Minab struck a school building. Iranian state media reported 47 civilian casualties including children. Pentagon stated the target was an IRGC facility adjacent to the school.

name: B-2 Strike on Underground Missile Site (Natanz area)
description: B-2 Spirit stealth bombers flying round-trip from CONUS (Whiteman AFB) delivered GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrators on hardened underground missile production sites. Part of 4-bomber strike package.

name: B-2 Strike on Underground Facility (Fordow area)
description: GBU-57 MOP strikes on hardened mountain facilities in the Fordow area by B-2 bombers, targeting suspected missile storage and production infrastructure.

name: Israeli Strikes on Tehran (Roaring Lion)
description: Israeli Air Force contribution to the combined strike package under Operation Roaring Lion, Israel's parallel codename for the joint operation.

name: Israeli Strikes on Isfahan
description: Israeli strikes on defense-industrial targets in the Isfahan area as part of Operation Roaring Lion.

name: Defense Minister Aziz Nasirzadeh Killed
description: Iranian Defence Minister Brigadier General Aziz Nasirzadeh confirmed killed in strikes on the Defense Ministry compound in Tehran.

name: IRIS Jamaran Corvette Sunk
description: Iranian Navy corvette IRIS Jamaran sunk in the Strait of Hormuz area during engagement with US Navy forces. The Jamaran was Iran's first domestically built warship.

name: Strait of Hormuz Closure
description: IRGC Navy declared closure of the Strait of Hormuz to all shipping following the start of Operation Epic Fury. Mine-laying operations and fast attack craft deployed across the shipping lanes. ~21% of global oil transit affected.

name: Hormuz Mine-Laying Operations
description: IRGC Navy deployed naval mines across the Strait of Hormuz shipping channels as part of the blockade operation.

name: Iranian Missile Strike on Beit Shemesh, Israel
description: Iranian ballistic missile salvo targeting populated area of Beit Shemesh, Israel. Partially intercepted by Iron Dome and Arrow systems.

name: Iranian Strike on US 5th Fleet HQ, Bahrain
description: Ballistic missile and drone attack on Naval Support Activity Bahrain, headquarters of US 5th Fleet and US Naval Forces Central Command.

name: Iranian Strike on Ali al-Salem Air Base, Kuwait
description: Iranian missile and drone strikes targeting Ali al-Salem Air Base in Kuwait, a major US Air Force forward operating location.

name: Iranian Missile Strike on Riyadh
description: Iranian ballistic missile strike on Riyadh, targeting Saudi military and government infrastructure. Saudi Patriot systems engaged incoming missiles.

name: Iranian Strike on Jebel Ali, Dubai
target: Jebel Ali Port / military facilities, Dubai
description: Iranian missile strikes targeting the Jebel Ali area in Dubai, which hosts both commercial port infrastructure and US logistics facilities.

name: Iranian Strike on Duqm, Oman
description: Iranian strikes on Duqm, Oman, where the US has access agreements for military logistics and staging.

name: Iranian Strike on Erbil, Iraq
target: US facilities near Erbil, Kurdistan Region, Iraq
description: Iranian missile strikes targeting US military facilities near Erbil International Airport in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq.

name: Iranian Strike on Al Udeid, Qatar
casualties: Unknown — CENTCOM forward HQ engaged defenses
description: Iranian strikes targeting Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar, the forward headquarters of US Central Command and Combined Air Operations Center.

name: USS Abraham Lincoln CSG Operations
description: USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) Carrier Strike Group operating in the North Arabian Sea, providing air support for Operation Epic Fury and fleet defense.

name: USS Gerald R. Ford CSG Operations
description: USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) Carrier Strike Group positioned in the Gulf of Oman, the largest concentration of American carrier aviation in the region in a generation.

name: Operation Midnight Hammer — Natanz
description: June 2025 nuclear strikes on Iran's primary uranium enrichment facility at Natanz as part of Operation Midnight Hammer. This earlier operation set the context for the February 2026 escalation.

name: Operation Midnight Hammer — Fordow
description: June 2025 strikes on the Fordow Fuel Enrichment Plant, built deep inside a mountain near Qom. Part of Operation Midnight Hammer targeting Iran's nuclear infrastructure.

name: Operation Midnight Hammer — Isfahan Nuclear
description: June 2025 strikes on Isfahan's Nuclear Technology Center, which housed the uranium conversion facility. Part of Operation Midnight Hammer.

name: Shiraz Air Defense Suppression
description: SEAD operations against integrated air defense systems around Shiraz as part of the opening wave of Epic Fury.

name: Bandar Abbas Naval/Military Strike
description: Strikes on Iranian naval facilities at Bandar Abbas, Iran's primary naval port on the Strait of Hormuz, targeting both regular Navy and IRGC Navy assets.

name: Dezful Missile Base Strike
description: Strikes on IRGC Aerospace Force underground missile storage and launch facilities in the Dezful area of Khuzestan province.

name: Kermanshah Military Strikes
description: Strikes on IRGC military facilities in western Iran near Kermanshah, a key logistics hub for Iran's western defenses.

name: Iranian Strike Toward Al-Tanf, Syria/Jordan Border
description: Iranian missile and drone strikes targeting the US garrison at Al-Tanf base on the Syria-Jordan border.

name: Semnan Space/Missile Center Strike
target: Semnan Space Launch Center / missile test facility
description: Strikes on the Semnan Space Launch Center, which also serves as a ballistic missile test and development facility.

name: Khatam al-Anbiya Air Defense Strike
target: Khatam al-Anbiya Air Defense HQ, Tehran
description: Opening strike on Iran's centralized air defense command to degrade coordinated response capability.

name: Houthi Solidarity Attacks — Red Sea
target: Commercial shipping in Red Sea / Bab el-Mandeb
description: Houthi forces (Ansar Allah) escalated attacks on commercial shipping in the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb strait in solidarity with Iran following Operation Epic Fury.

name: Hezbollah Rocket Barrage — Northern Israel
description: Hezbollah launched rocket and drone barrages against northern Israel in solidarity with Iran following Operation Epic Fury.

name: Iranian Cyber Retaliation
description: Iranian state-sponsored cyber operations targeting US and Israeli critical infrastructure, financial systems, and government networks in retaliation for Operation Epic Fury.

name: B-2 Strike Package — Whiteman AFB Launch
target: Launch point for B-2 round-trip mission
description: Four B-2 Spirit stealth bombers launched from Whiteman Air Force Base, Missouri for a round-trip mission to Iran carrying GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrators. Total mission time ~30 hours with aerial refueling.
